- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

## 🚨 Merge Requirements

**This PR cannot be merged until ALL requirements are met:**

### ✅ Required Quality Gates (Automated)
- [ ] **CI / Lint** - Code linting passes
- [ ] **CI / Type Check** - TypeScript types pass
- [ ] **CI / Test** - Tests pass with **80%+ coverage**
- [ ] **CI / Build** - Build succeeds
- [ ] **E2E Tests** - End-to-end tests pass
- [ ] **Code Quality** - No critical complexity issues
- [ ] **Commit Lint** - All commits follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] **Security** - No critical vulnerabilities

### 👥 Required Reviews
- [ ] **1+ maintainer approval**
- [ ] **All conversations resolved**

### 📋 Quality Standards
- [ ] **Code coverage ≥ 80%**
- [ ] **No critical security vulnerabilities**
- [ ] **Cyclomatic complexity ≤ 15**
- [ ] **All tests passing**

> 💡 **Note**: Most checks are automatic. Check the PR status for real-time results.

## Testing
<!-- Describe testing performed -->
- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Cross-platform tested (React, React Native, Flutter)
- [ ] Accessibility tested
- [ ] Performance tested (if applicable)

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules

## 📚 Additional Information

See [`.github/MERGE_RULES.md`](https://github.com/choihooo/hi-design-system/blob/main/.github/MERGE_RULES.md) for detailed merge requirements.
